author: lxcxjxhx
title: Windows Debug build fails - LNK1116 cannot grow ilk file for ov_lp_transformations_tests
signature: cannot grow ilk file; error code 487|Infrastructure

failed_jobs.name: Build / Build
failed_jobs.symptom: LINK fatal error LNK1116: cannot grow ilk file for ov_lp_transformations_tests.exe; error code 487

key_errors: LINK : fatal error LNK1116: cannot grow ilk file 'C:\actions-runner\_work\openvino\openvino\openvino\bin\intel64\Debug\ov_lp_transformations_tests.ilk'; error code 487
root_cause: The Windows MSVC incremental linker failed to grow the .ilk (incremental link) file for ov_lp_transformations_tests.exe during a Debug build. Error code 487 (ERROR_INVALID_ADDRESS) indicates the OS could not find a suitable virtual address range to extend the memory-mapped .ilk file. This is a transient resource exhaustion on the Windows runner - not caused by the PR changes, which only modify a Python test file to use a context manager.
reproduction_steps: N/A - transient runner resource exhaustion; not reproducible deterministically.
recommended_actions: Re-run the failed Build job - the failure is transient and unrelated to the PR changes.
If the failure recurs, consider disabling incremental linking for Debug builds (/INCREMENTAL:NO) to avoid .ilk file growth issues on constrained runners.
prevention_strategies: Monitor Windows Debug build runners for disk/memory resource constraints. Consider adding /INCREMENTAL:NO to CMake link flags for large test binaries on Windows CI.
historical_context: No prior occurrences of LNK1116 on this signature found in the investigation database.
